```plantuml
@startuml
class Employee {

    - name: String
    - surname: String
    - bday: String
    - nationality: String

    - dataEnd: String
    - salary: int
    - phone: int

    + getSalary()
    + getPhone()

    + getTDataEnd()
    + getTSalary()
    + getTPost()
    + getTNationality()
}

class Game {
    - id: int
    - opponent: String
    - competition: String
    - data: String
    - score: int
    - scoreOpponent: int
    - home: int
    + Game()
    + Game()

    + getOpponent()
    + getCompetition()
    + getData()
    + getScore()
    + getScoreOpponent()
    + getHome()
    + getTOpponent()

    + getTData()
    + getTScore()
    + getTScoreOpponent()
    + getTHome()
}

class GameStat {
    - id: int
    - name: String
    - surname: String
    - start: int
    - substitutes: int
    - goal: int
    - assist: int
    - opponent: String
    + getId()
    + getName()
    + getSurname()
    + getStart()
    + getSubstitutes()
    + getGoal()
    + getAssist()
    + getOpponent()
    + GameStat()

    + getTSurname()
    + getTOpponent()
    + getTAssist()
    + getTGoal()
    + getTStart()
    + getTSubstitutes()
}

class Player {
    - id: int
    - name: String
    - surname: String
    - bday: String
    - nationality: String
    - dataSign: String
    - dataEnd: String
    - salary: int
    - phone: int
    - price: int
    + getId()
    + getName()
    + getSurname()
    + getBday()
    + getNationality()
    + getDataSign()
    + getDataEnd()
    + getSalary()
    + getPrice()
    + getTName()
    + getTSurname()
    + getTBday()
    + getTDataSign()
    + getTDataEnd()
    + getTSalary()
    + getTPrice()

}

class MyAlert {
    + ShowAlertError()
    + ShowAlertInfo()
}

class User {
    - Login: String
    - Grand: String
    + User()
    + getLogin()
    + getSTLogin()
    + getSTGrand()
}

@enduml
```
